query:
ALTER TABLE transactions
  ADD COLUMN buyer_contact_id INT NULL REFERENCES contacts(id),
  ADD COLUMN buyerCommissionRate DECIMAL(5,4) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN buyerCommissionType ENUM('percentage','flat') NULL DEFAULT 'percentage',
  ADD COLUMN buyerNotes TEXT NULL;

  ADD COLUMN buyerCommissionRate DECIMAL(5,4) NULL,
